1. **Fix 1 (EmptyStateIcon → EmptyState icon prop):** Removed `<EmptyStateIcon icon={ExclamationCircleIcon} color={globalDangerColor200.value} />` from JSX and moved the `icon` prop to `<EmptyState icon={ExclamationCircleIcon}>`.
